name: MediaPipe Face Overlay
description: Self-contained rehearsal twin for the MediaPipe face-landmark look: a dimmed video background plus a Script SOP face mesh seeded from a built-in landmark table, composited with Over TOP and finished through a tint pass. Replace the `landmarks` Table DAT or the Script SOP source with the 468-landmark CHOP/DAT produced by setup_face_tracking when the MediaPipe plugin is available. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: videoin
nodes.comment: Webcam background. macOS will prompt for camera permission on first cook; the mesh still previews if the camera is unavailable.

nodes.name: bg_level
nodes.comment: Dim the camera so the landmark mesh reads on top.

nodes.name: landmarks
nodes.comment: Built-in rehearsal landmarks: name, x, y, z. Replace with live MediaPipe face data later.

nodes.name: face_mesh
nodes.comment: Script SOP callbacks draw face contours, eyes, nose, mouth and sample mesh rows from landmarks.

nodes.name: face_cb
nodes.comment: Script SOP callbacks for the rehearsal face mesh.

nodes.name: render
nodes.comment: Transparent face mesh render so it composites over the dimmed webcam.

nodes.name: overlay
nodes.comment: Face mesh over the dimmed webcam background.

python_code.face_cb:
EDGES = [
    ['chin0','chin1'], ['chin1','chin2'], ['chin2','chin3'], ['chin3','chin4'], ['chin4','chin5'], ['chin5','chin6'],
    ['chin0','jawL'], ['jawL','templeL'], ['templeL','forehead'], ['forehead','templeR'], ['templeR','jawR'], ['jawR','chin6'],
    ['browL0','browL1'], ['browL1','browL2'], ['browR0','browR1'], ['browR1','browR2'],
    ['eyeL0','eyeL1'], ['eyeL1','eyeL2'], ['eyeL2','eyeL3'], ['eyeL3','eyeL0'],
    ['eyeR0','eyeR1'], ['eyeR1','eyeR2'], ['eyeR2','eyeR3'], ['eyeR3','eyeR0'],
    ['nose0','nose1'], ['nose1','nose2'], ['nose2','noseL'], ['nose2','noseC'], ['nose2','noseR'],
    ['mouthL','mouthT'], ['mouthT','mouthR'], ['mouthR','mouthB'], ['mouthB','mouthL'],
    ['browL2','nose0'], ['browR0','nose0'], ['eyeL3','meshL0'], ['eyeR3','meshR0'],
    ['meshL0','meshL1'], ['meshL1','meshL2'], ['meshR0','meshR1'], ['meshR1','meshR2'],
    ['meshL2','mouthL'], ['meshR2','mouthR'], ['noseL','mouthL'], ['noseR','mouthR'],
]
DOT_SIZE = 0.012

def _add_line(scriptOp, pts, a, b):
    if a not in pts or b not in pts:
        return
    poly = scriptOp.appendPoly(2, closed=False, addPoints=False)
    poly[0].point = pts[a]
    poly[1].point = pts[b]

def _add_dot(scriptOp, point):
    x, y, z = point.x, point.y, point.z
    p0 = scriptOp.appendPoint(); p0.x = x - DOT_SIZE; p0.y = y; p0.z = z
    p1 = scriptOp.appendPoint(); p1.x = x + DOT_SIZE; p1.y = y; p1.z = z
    p2 = scriptOp.appendPoint(); p2.x = x; p2.y = y - DOT_SIZE; p2.z = z
    p3 = scriptOp.appendPoint(); p3.x = x; p3.y = y + DOT_SIZE; p3.z = z
    h = scriptOp.appendPoly(2, closed=False, addPoints=False); h[0].point = p0; h[1].point = p1
    v = scriptOp.appendPoly(2, closed=False, addPoints=False); v[0].point = p2; v[1].point = p3

def onCook(scriptOp):
    scriptOp.clear()
    src = op('../landmarks')
    if src is None or src.numRows < 2:
        return
    pts = {}
    for r in range(1, src.numRows):
        name = src[r, 0].val
        try:
            x = float(src[r, 1].val)
            y = float(src[r, 2].val)
            z = float(src[r, 3].val)
        except Exception:
            continue
        p = scriptOp.appendPoint()
        p.x = x; p.y = y; p.z = z
        pts[name] = p
    for a, b in EDGES:
        _add_line(scriptOp, pts, a, b)
    for p in list(pts.values()):
        _add_dot(scriptOp, p)
    return

preview_description: A dimmed webcam frame with a cyan-green face mesh overlay: jaw contour, eyes, brows, nose, mouth, cheek rows and small landmark ticks. The built-in landmark table makes the recipe preview offline; replace it with live MediaPipe face data for a real performer.
